name: Apple Citrus Refresher
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare all juices and ginger ale well in advance at a chilled temperature.
2. In a large pitcher or punch bowl, combine the apple, orange, grapefruit, and lime juices.
3. Just before serving, pour in the ginger ale.
4. Serve over ice cubes in tall glasses.
Makes: 8-10 servings
